item.title: [Latent Space] Notion’s Token Town: 5 Rebuilds, 100+ Tools, MCP vs CLIs and the Software Factory Future — Simon Last & Sarah Sachs of Notion
item.description:
Speaker 1 | 00:00 - 00:08 Broadly speaking, I'm really bullish on CLIs. I'm still bullish on MCPs in a certain environment. I think it'd be really great for when you want, like, a narrow lightweight agent. I think
Speaker 2 | 00:08 - 00:10 there's definitely a lot of use cases where you
Speaker 1 | 00:10 - 00:24 don't want, like, a full coding agent with the compute runtime. And, also, you want it to be, like, more tightly permissioned. MCP inherently has a really strong permission model. Like...
